chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT AT LARKANA Crl.Transfer.Appln.No.S-35 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-. 26.10.2018 Mr. Ali Azhar Tunio, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Raja Imtiaz Ali Solangi, A.P.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The applicant by way of instant application u/ s. 526 Cr.PC has sought for transfer of his case from the file of learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Mehar, to any other Court of competent jurisdiction, which is not opposed by the other side. In view of above, the case of the applicant is transferred to the Court of learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Mehar, for its disposal according to law. The instant application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
